MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jennifer P. Tang, Esq., NOMOS LLP (510) 930-3300 jtang@nomosllp.com Attorneys for Petitioner
4029-4033 JUDAH LLC

Not ARGUED. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 4029-4033 JUDAH LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED Notice Of Hearing On 4029-4033 Judah Llc Verified Petition For Order Releasing Mechanics Lien Pursuant To Civil Code Sections 8480 Et Seq.

Petitioner's unopposed petition for order releasing mechanic's lien is granted.

Order and judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
